subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of the All-Merciful in Hamadan! Verily, your city was once a mighty capital and the seat of the throne of sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الرحمن فی همدان ان مدینتکم هذه کانت عاصمه عظمی و مقر سریر السلطنه
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @living waters; water of life
